name: ai-workspace-connector
description: 轻量级 AI 工作区连接器

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite" "tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json --watch" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/main.js && npm run rebuild:native && electron dist-electron/main.js"
scripts.build: tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build
